title: Option to use TABS to open Multiple Boards At Once
excerpt: This is a request to be able to use tabs across the top so that we can have multiple board in difference workspaces open at once.  It always feels a bit clumsy for me to go back and forth between boards in different work…

posts.author: 2bhiggins (Bill Higgins)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a request to be able to use tabs across the top so that we can have multiple board in difference workspaces open at once. It always feels a bit clumsy for me to go back and forth between boards in different work spaces.

posts.author: garfield-labs (Snir Alon)
posts.cookedHtml: Try Same Item Multiple Boards , you can simply bring all your tasks into one board and manage it from there
